turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hello, Sunrise Clinic? Mera beta hai, uske liye pediatrician appointment book karni hai.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Haan ji, zaroor. Bachche ka naam aur umar bata sakte hain aap?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Arjun Mehta. Abhi 4 saal ka hai. Usse fever aa raha hai last 2 days se.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Dhanyawaad. Dr. Anita Saraf humari pediatrician hain. Aaj evening 5:30 PM ka slot available hai. Chalega?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Haan haan, aaj hi theek hai. Confirm kar dijiye.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Bilkul. Arjun Mehta ke liye aaj 5:30 PM Dr. Anita Saraf ke saath book ho gaya. SMS aayega. Baaki kuch?
